name: Credit Pros
description_short: Credit Pros is a Detroit-based credit repair company offering dispute services and credit restoration. Located on Montgomery Street with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
Credit Pros operates as a credit and debt service company based in Detroit, Michigan, serving the local community from their Montgomery Street location near the intersection with Lawton Street. The company is positioned in the credit repair industry, which focuses on disputing inaccurate, incomplete, or unverifiable negative items on consumer credit reports. Like other companies in the fix-my-credit category, Credit Pros works to help consumers challenge errors that may be damaging their credit scores and financial opportunities. The company maintains a physical office presence, suggesting they offer in-person consultations alongside remote services. Credit Pros can be reached by phone at (248) 534-1690 and maintains an online presence through their website at premiercreditpros.com. Their service model appears designed to serve Detroit-area residents seeking professional assistance with credit report issues. The company operates Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM, indicating extended evening hours for working consumers, though they are closed on weekends. Limited information is available from the Yahoo Local listing, which is primarily a directory entry rather than a detailed company profile. The company's specific service offerings, pricing structure, dispute methodology, and track record cannot be fully determined from the available website content. Without access to customer reviews, testimonials, or detailed service descriptions from their primary website, it is difficult to assess the company's reputation, effectiveness, or competitive positioning within the credit repair market. Potential customers should verify licensing, accreditation, and service terms directly through their website or contact information before engaging services.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended business hours (9 AM - 8 PM weekdays) accommodate working professionals
Physical office location in Detroit allows for in-person consultations
Local phone number (248) 534-1690 provides direct contact access
Dedicated website at premiercreditpros.com suggests online presence and digital services
Located near major street intersection (Montgomery & Lawton) for easy accessibility
cons: Closed on weekends, limiting access for some consumers
Limited verifiable information available about specific services, pricing, or credentials
No customer reviews or ratings visible in the directory listing
Website content not provided, preventing assessment of service details or company reputation
No information about licensing, accreditation (FCRA compliance), or dispute success rates
best_for: Detroit-area residents with credit report errors seeking in-person service
Working professionals who need evening appointment availability
Consumers preferring local, brick-and-mortar credit repair over national online services
diagnosis: Credit Pros is best suited for Detroit-area consumers seeking local, in-person credit repair services with extended weekday hours. The primary caveat is the lack of publicly available information about their credentials, methodology, pricing, and customer satisfaction—potential clients should verify their licensing and service terms directly before engagement.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
